title: You have ideas. The problem is what happens next.
subtitle: Most creators don't have an inspiration problem. They have a system problem. Every post feel like starting from scratch.

lost_ideas.title: Ideas that slip away
lost_ideas.description: Screenshots, scattered notes, messages to yourself. They arrive — and disappear.

no_criteria.title: You don't know what's worth publishing
no_criteria.description: You have ideas, but it's difficult to make decisions. Is this one good? Did I use it already? Where do I start?

always_zero.title: Always starting from scratch
always_zero.description: Trends, generic AI, inspiration that never comes. No system that learns from what you've already done.

no_path.title: An idea, but no clear path
no_path.description: You know what you want to say. You don't know how to turn it into content that lasts.
